scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.agent:setup: cd apps/agent && python3.12 -m venv .venv312 && . .venv312/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.signal:kill: PIDS=$(lsof -nP -iTCP:4001 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | grep -i python | awk '{print $2}' | sort -u); [ -n "$PIDS" ] && kill -9 $PIDS; echo 'signal-api killed'
scripts.signal:dev: npm run signal:kill; cd apps/agent && . .venv312/bin/activate && python -m analytics.signal_api
scripts.agent:dev: npm run agent:kill; cd apps/agent && . .venv312/bin/activate && python main.py dev
scripts.agent:dev:ext: npm run agent:kill; cd apps/agent && . .venv312/bin/activate && SIGNAL_API_INPROCESS=0 python main.py dev
